subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí-Qablí-Akbar! Thy petition hath attained unto the Most Holy Court, and the servant in attendance hath laid before Us that which thou didst mention [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی قبل اکبر عریضه ات بساحت اقدس فائز و عبد حاضر آنچه ذکر نمودی معروض
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
